evidence: The paper explicitly states variable importance was calculated using "permutation" importance, not impurity-based methods. Main conclusions concern trait correlation structure (validated via phylogenetic independent contrasts and raw-data replication, shown in Supplementary Figs. 20-23), PCA axes, and functional clustering. Environmental variable influence is quantified via Shapley values. Cross-validated model accuracy used buffered leave-one-out validation accounting for spatial and phylogenetic autocorrelation.
